images.section_lead: Monitor bases, manage production, and control your plans effortlessly. With intuitive, powerful tools, you can strategize, expand, and outsmart your rivals wherever you are.
images.empire: Empire: Track production, supply chains, and growth across all your planets.
images.plan: Plan: Strategize and analyze without spending in-game resources.
images.management: Management: Coordinate plans, expansions, and your next moves effortlessly.
images.exchanges: Exchanges: Optimize in-game pricing and trading strategies.
images.market_exploration: Exploration: Analyze years of market data for smarter insights.
images.planet_search: Search: Find the exact planets and resources you need instantly.

hero.title: Plan your empire
hero.subtitle: Rule Prosperous Universe
hero.lead: Say goodbye to cumbersome spreadsheets and hello to seamless management of your in-game assets.

features.section_lead: Streamline your planning and resource management, ensure you stay ahead in the galaxy.

simulation.label: Base Simulation
simulation.text: PRUNplanner lets you design and try new bases without spending in-game resources. It mirrors all aspects of a base, from habitation and production buildings to COGC programs and planet resources.

planning.label: Empire Planning
planning.text: Effortlessly organize and manage your entire empire. With PRUNplanner, you can plan across multiple bases and complex supply chains, ensuring your material flows remain on schedule and your empire runs smoothly.

gamedata.label: Game Data
gamedata.text: Stay ahead with up-to-date market information integrated directly from the game's community API (FIO). Make informed planning and expansion decisions based on actual markets and the best ROI.

burn_repair.label: Burn & Repair
burn_repair.text: Prevent shortages and bottlenecks with detailed management tools. PRUNplanner tracks your resources and consumables, ensuring you have everything you need right when you need it, keeping your operations seamless.

market_exploration.label: Market Exploration
market_exploration.text: Explore historic market trends from past years and uncover how markets truly behave. Spot exciting opportunities, and effortlessly calculate Return on Investment for every recipe and resource — giving you the strategic edge you need for smarter planning.

tools.label: A Wealth of Additional Tools
tools.text: Explore material prices from now to years past, know the optimal times for repairing production buildings, monitor expert spawn times, and optimize habitation buildings for minimal area or cost. PRUNplanner offers these features and many more.

concepts.section_lead: PRUNplanner consists of three main components that allow you to plan and manage your Prosperous Universe empire.

plans.label: Plans
plans.text: Plans are the backbone of what you do in PRUNplanner. They consist of all buildings, productions and bonuses of a base you can put down in Prosperous Universe. You can create new plans by searching for the planet you would like to create a base for. Also, a plan should be assigned a CX Exchange preference, as well as be assigned to an Empire.

empires.label: Empires
empires.text: An Empire is a collection of plans (e.g. all the bases you currently have settled in Prosperous Universe, or that you would like to settle, all interconnected together). Each empire is like a container that consists of multiple plans. Additionally, an exchange preference can be assigned to each Empire.

exchanges.label: Exchanges
exchanges.text: The Exchange Settings allow you to define market preferences for the pricing of materials. Each preference can be used in multiple Empires. However, each Empire can only have a single Exchange preference assigned to it. This ensures that prices are properly calculated for all individual plans that are part of the Empire.

tools.section_title: Powered by tools we love to use

open_source.section_lead: PRUNplanner is completely free to use, and its frontend is fully {link}.
open_source.prompt: Love it? We'd be thrilled if you contributed!

homepage.love: Made with ♥  in Munich, with contributions from around the world.

sync_warning.title: 检测到不匹配：
sync_warning.body: @:empire.configuration.sync_warning.title 已配置许可：{configured}，规划许可：{planned}。请使用游戏内的 {hq_buffer} 同步这些数值，以确保派系加成计算准确。

plan_list.setup_prompt: 在 {management} 中分配已有规划，或使用 {search} 创建一个。

opportunities.headline: Production Opportunities
opportunities.intro: Find recipe opportunities to convert excess materials into other products. This view identifies production opportunities where your Material I/O shows a positive delta, prioritized by input availability
opportunities.note: Do not rely on the available opportunity alone. Cross-reference trade volumes and exchange overviews (via hover on the material) to assess market liquidity and potential ROI. Use indicators to identify which specific material is bottlenecking your scaling potential or if selling your available delta is more profitable than moving to another production.
